name: Marinaded Wild Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Cover and heat to boiling.
3. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Add mushrooms and simmer, uncovered, for 3 minutes.
5. Transfer the mixture and mushrooms to a bowl, including liquid.
6. Chill overnight, stirring occasionally.
7. Drain and serve as a salad or appetizer.
Many wild mushrooms are poisonous, either mildly or fatally. Use only those you know or buy some. Willow mushrooms, called oyster mushrooms in Louisiana, occur in late fall/winter on sides of dead willows and are ideal for this dish.
